title: steward: align documentation and schema versions to v1.10.0 release 🚢
summary: Updated NOW.md, SCHEMA.md, sensor-report-v1.md, and design.md to reflect v1.10.0 instead of the historical v1.9.0 release.
proof_summary: Replaced hardcoded 1.9.0 references in operational docs. Verified with `cargo xtask docs --check` and `cargo xtask version-consistency`.
